name: iPhone 9D Full Cover Tempered Glass
description: High-durability 9D edge-to-edge tempered glass providing seamless coverage, maximum scratch resistance, and pristine HD clarity.
warning: Clean the display thoroughly using the dust-absorber sticker to prevent permanent air bubbles.

name: iPhone Premium Anti-Spy Privacy Glass
description: Advanced 28-degree side-view blocking privacy glass that keeps your confidential onscreen data safe from wandering eyes in public crowded areas.
warning: This privacy filter decreases screen brightness slightly; you may need to adjust your display levels manually.

name: iPhone Unbreakable Matte Hydrogel Protector
description: Ultra-thin, self-healing hydrogel membrane with a frosted matte finish. Perfect for elimination of glare and oily smudges.
warning: Any tiny application lines or residual bubbles disappear entirely within 24 to 48 hours.

name: Android 5D UV Liquid Glue Tempered Glass
description: Specialized liquid UV adhesive installation kit engineered perfectly to lock onto curved display edges without lifting away over time.

specs.compatibility: Samsung Galaxy S22/S23/S24 Ultra, OnePlus Curved Series
specs.safety: Heavy Duty Drop & Edge Impact Shield

warning: Cover the earpiece speaker grill using the protective tape strip provided before dispensing the liquid glue.

name: Android Universal Clear Tempered Glass
description: Affordable, reliable everyday defensive tempered glass delivering high transparency and scratch prevention for flat screen displays.

specs.compatibility: Samsung A Series, Tecno Camon/Spark, Infinix Note/Hot, Redmi Series

warning: This flat profile glass will leave a minor unsealed border gap if installed onto heavily curved 2.5D screens.

name: Android Ultra-Clear Hydrogel Membrane
description: A highly resilient, flexible elastic clear film designed to form perfectly to curved edges while sustaining optimal fingerprint scanner recognition.

specs.compatibility: All Samsung Galaxy, Tecno, Infinix, Oppo, and Xiaomi Smartphones

warning: Avoid scraping or pushing on the soft film surface with sharp fingernails during the application phase.

name: Android Privacy Anti-Spy Hydrogel Protector
description: Combines advanced side-angle viewing dark filters with flexible hydrogel layers to bring privacy protection straight to curved screen smartphones.

specs.compatibility: Samsung Galaxy S and Note Series, Premium Android Flags

warning: For optical scanning modules, re-register your saved system fingerprints after completing the installation.

name: Universal Flexible Ceramic Screen Guard
description: An innovative premium hybrid formulation mixing glass hardness with plastic flexibility to yield a shield that never cracks or chips along its borders.

specs.compatibility: Extensive model layouts for both iPhone and major Android manufacturers

warning: This specific hybrid structure behaves with slightly more surface reflection than basic tempered glass variants.

name: Universal OG Premium Tempered Glass
description: The classic, reliable OG defensive armor screen protector offering excellent impact distribution and anti-scratch security at a pocket-friendly price.

specs.compatibility: Universal sizes available for all major iPhone and Android flat display screens

warning: Ensure the device panel is 100% dry and dust-free before alignment to drop the glass layer smoothly.

name: Universal Anti-Spy Privacy Screen Guard
description: Essential micro-louver privacy protection filtering out visibility from peripheral side angles to protect your credentials on the go.

specs.compatibility: Available cross-cut options for popular iPhone, Samsung, Tecno, and Infinix models

warning: This privacy screen tint is optimized for vertical portrait layouts; side viewing in landscape may vary.

name: Universal Full Glue Curved Screen Protector
description: Specially formulated comprehensive edge-to-edge full adhesive layer designed to seamlessly mount onto flagship curved smartphone panels without lifting.

specs.material: Highly Elastic PMMA & Composite Resin Layer
specs.compatibility: Tailored for all edge-curved models from Samsung Ultra, Oppo, and OnePlus series

warning: Apply firm even pressure along the curved borders during installation to guarantee a long-lasting secure bond.
